payload.answer: Committed one deduplicated memory that Sam from Goldman mentioned liking Bill Evans.
citations: Same input delivered three times: Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.

entity_resolution.reason: The input identifies the person only as 'Sam from Goldman'; without more context, this should not be merged with any specific existing Sam. The same message was delivered three times, so it should be treated as one fact, not three.

details: Preserved ambiguity around which Sam and which Goldman are meant.
